title: Preserve Agent Plugin Lifecycle Dependency Direction
forbids: service imports of concrete providers or controller implementation, runtime exports from module ports, and CLI runtime imports outside the client or exact binding facades
why: The service owns lifecycle semantics behind type-only resource protocols. Runtime construction crosses one named binding facade, so a port or deep service path cannot become a second executable owner.
remediate: Keep ports protocol/type-only, bind concrete resources through src/bindings, and consume runtime values only through the service client or an exact bindings/* package export.
message: Lifecycle dependencies must point from controller composition through exact binding facades and type-only service ports to resource contracts.
